bird.name: Scaly-naped pigeon
bird.summary: The scaly-naped pigeon (Patagioenas squamosa), also known as the red-necked pigeon, is a bird belonging to the family Columbidae. The speci…

locations.name: 雨林
locations.summary: 雨林是雨量甚多的生物區系。雨林依位置的不同分热带雨林和溫帶雨林。雨林大多数靠近赤道，在赤道经过的非洲、亚洲和南美洲都有大片的雨林。湿润的气候保证了树和植物的快速生产。同时，树和植物也为雨林中的成千上万种生物提供了食物和庇护所。雨林曾經覆蓋…

relations.subject: Scaly-naped pigeon
relations.evidence: |editor4-last=Schulenberg |editor4-first=Thomas S.|url-access=subscription }} The species tends to occur in rainforests, however they may also be found in drier lowland woodlands; the species is locally common near human settlements
